# Widgetron

A small library that turns widgets into wodgets. Widgetron exists to
provide a single canonical conversion path that doesn't depend on the
upstream widget format.

## Why

Until Widgetron, every team rolled their own wodget converter. They
mostly worked. They all disagreed at the edges. Widgetron picks one
behaviour and sticks to it.

## Install

```
npm install widgetron
```
